# GigWiseTax

> Free gig worker tax calculator for US independent contractors. Covers all 51 states. Self-employment tax 15.3%, federal + state income tax, quarterly payments. IRS mileage rate 72.5¢/mile 2026. No signup, no data stored.

## Platform Calculators

- [DoorDash Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/doordash) — SE tax, quarterly payments, mileage deduction
- [Uber Driver Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/uber) — SE tax $7,750 on $35K net
- [Instacart Shopper Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/instacart)
- [Lyft Driver Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/lyft)
- [Amazon Flex Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/amazon-flex)
- [Airbnb Host Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/airbnb)
- [Turo Host Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/turo)
- [OnlyFans Creator Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/onlyfans)
- [Etsy Seller Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/etsy)
- [Fiverr Freelancer Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/fiverr)
- [Upwork Freelancer Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/upwork)
- [Grubhub Driver Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/grubhub)
- [Shipt Shopper Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/shipt)
- [Rover Pet Sitter Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/rover)
- [TaskRabbit Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/taskrabbit)
- [Walmart Spark Driver Tax Calculator 2026](https://www.gigwisetax.com/walmart-spark)

## Key Tax Facts 2026

- IRS mileage rate: 72.5 cents per mile
- SE tax rate: 15.3% (12.4% Social Security + 2.9% Medicare)
- SE tax formula: net income x 0.9235 x 0.153
- 1099-NEC threshold (OBBBA 2026): $2,000
- Quarterly deadlines: April 15, June 16, September 15, January 15
- QBI deduction: up to 20% of qualified business income
